message:
test(tui): update history snapshots — remove "open commit" keybinding hint

Update two insta snapshots to reflect TUI changes:
- Remove "Browser Link: open selected commit (o" text from the
  commit detail panel (feature removed or relocated)
- Remove "o open commit" from the status bar keybinding hints
- Add "h/Esc back" hint to git history mode status bar for
  navigation consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
